'''''Classic Adventures: Volume Three''''' is an anthology of three previously published [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]] adventures. It was released by [[West End Games]] in [[1996]].

==Contents==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']]
*''[[Death in the Undercity]]''
*''[[Tatooine Manhunt]]''
